claim: SWE-Bench Verified represents an important shift in how we evaluate LLM coding capabilities, moving beyond simplified synthetic benchmarks
actionable: Use SWE-Bench Verified as a benchmark when evaluating coding-capable LLMs rather than simpler task-specific benchmarks
source_title: The End of SWE-Bench Verified — Mia Glaese & Olivia Watkins, OpenAI Frontier Evals

claim: Frontier evaluation methodologies from OpenAI now include real-world software engineering tasks with complex dependencies
actionable: When benchmarking coding LLMs, prefer evaluations that include real repository tasks with dependencies over isolated problem sets
source_title: The End of SWE-Bench Verified — Mia Glaese & Olivia Watkins, OpenAI Frontier Evals
